name: Puffco New Peak Pro
summary: A desktop-style electric dab rig for concentrate patients who medicate at home and want no torch.
description: The Peak Pro is a battery-powered dab rig with a ceramic 3D chamber and built-in water filtration, so concentrate patients get a smooth, cooled draw without a butane torch or exposed nail. Heat-up takes around 30 seconds, with four temperature presets from 232°C to 316°C and fine control through the Puffco app. The glass mouthpiece and laser-cut perc keep flavour clean. It suits patients prescribed cannabis extracts, wax or shatter who want consistent, repeatable dosing at home. It is bulkier and pricier than a pen, so it is a home device, not a pocket one.

specs.label: Dimensions
specs.value: 7" High and 2.75" Base / 17.7 cm x 6.98 cm
